title: Rari Capital - REKT
relevance_summary: Cross-chain exploit using fake tokens and liquidity pools on multiple platforms

prevention.rule: Block any tx that creates a fake token and pools it on multiple platforms within a short timeframe

red_flags: Pooling fake tokens on multiple platforms
summary: The attacker created fake tokens and pooled them on multiple platforms to exploit vulnerabilities in Rari Capital's ETH pool contract, resulting in a loss of $11.1M. A guard could have detected and blocked the creation and pooling of fake tokens on multiple platforms.
